Generate high-signal 2D functional data with proper interface

data_generator_high_signal.Rd

Creates synthetic 2D functional data using the working high-signal approach but with the same interface as data_generator_po_2d for compatibility

Usage

data_generator_high_signal(
  n = 100,
  grid_x = 20,
  grid_y = 20,
  intercept = 0.6,
  noise_sd = 0.25,
  response_type = "binomial",
  signal_strength = 2.5,
  n_missing = 0,
  min_distance_x = NULL,
  min_distance_y = NULL
)

Arguments

n

Number of samples to generate

grid_x

Number of points in x-axis grid

grid_y

Number of points in y-axis grid

intercept

Target proportion for binomial or intercept for Gaussian

noise_sd

Standard deviation of measurement noise

response_type

Type of response ("binomial" or "gaussian")

signal_strength

Strength of discriminative signal (default 2.5)

n_missing

Not used (kept for compatibility)

min_distance_x

Not used (kept for compatibility)

min_distance_y

Not used (kept for compatibility)

Value

A list containing simulated data with same structure as data_generator_po_2d
